steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $2700$, so the answer is $2700$. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content:
$$f(10) = 270 × 10 = 2700$$

This is a direct function evaluation: $x=10$ means use the output of the rule at input 10, not solve for a new input.
